if.name: if

elseif.name: elseif
elseif.description:
Used within `{if}` to provide an additional conditional branch.

Usage: `{elseif condition}`

else.name: else
else.description:
Used within `{if}` to provide a fallback branch.

Usage: `{else}`

for.name: for
for.description: Loop block. Usage: `{for @item of $list}...{/for}` or `{for @item, @index of $list}...{/for}`

next.name: next
next.description:
Continues to the next iteration of a `{for}` loop.

Usage: `{next}`

stop.name: stop
stop.description:
Breaks out of a `{for}` or `{repeat}` loop.

Usage: `{stop}`

switch.name: switch

case.name: case
case.description:
Defines a branch within a `{switch}` macro.

Usage: `{case value}`

default.name: default
default.description:
Defines the default branch within a `{switch}` macro.

Usage: `{default}`

set.name: set
set.description:
Sets variables based on the given expression.

Usage: `{set $var to value}`

Supports `$var` (story), `_var` (temporary), and `@var` (local) variables.

unset.name: unset
unset.description:
Unsets one or more variables.

Usage: `{unset $var}`

computed.name: computed
computed.description:
Evaluates an expression and outputs the result.

Usage: `{computed expression}`

print.name: print
print.description:
Outputs the result of the given expression.

Usage: `{print expression}`

do.name: do
do.description:
Displays its contents. Can be updated dynamically.

Usage:

```
{do}
  ...
{/do}
```

link.name: link
link.description:
Creates a link that executes its contents when clicked.

Usage:

```
{link "text" "passage"}
  ...
{/link}
```

button.name: button
button.description:
Creates a button that executes its contents when clicked.

Usage:

```
{button "text" "passage"}
  ...
{/button}
```

timed.name: timed

repeat.name: repeat
repeat.description:
Repeatedly displays its contents at the specified interval.

Usage:

```
{repeat delay}
  ...
{/repeat}
```

type.name: type
type.description:
Outputs its contents one character at a time, mimicking a typewriter effect.

Usage:

```
{type speed}
  ...
{/type}
```

option.name: option
option.description:
Defines an option within a `{listbox}` or `{cycle}` macro.

Usage: `{option label}`

meter.name: meter
meter.description:
Displays a progress meter.

Usage: `{meter $var min max}`

goto.name: goto
goto.description:
Navigates to the specified passage.

Usage: `{goto "passage"}`

back.name: back
back.description:
Creates a link or navigates to the previous passage in history.

Usage: `{back}`

forward.name: forward
forward.description:
Creates a link or navigates to the next passage in history.

Usage: `{forward}`

include.name: include
include.description:
Outputs the contents of the specified passage.

Usage: `{include "passage"}`

passage.name: passage
passage.description:
Outputs the name of the current passage.

Usage: `{passage}`

textbox.name: textbox
textbox.description:
Creates a text input box.

Usage: `{textbox "$receiver" defaultValue}`

numberbox.name: numberbox
numberbox.description:
Creates a number input box.

Usage: `{numberbox "$receiver" defaultValue}`

textarea.name: textarea
textarea.description:
Creates a multi-line text input area.

Usage: `{textarea "$receiver" defaultValue}`

checkbox.name: checkbox
checkbox.description:
Creates a checkbox input.

Usage: `{checkbox "$receiver" uncheckedValue checkedValue}`

radiobutton.name: radiobutton
radiobutton.description:
Creates a radio button input.

Usage: `{radiobutton "$receiver" value}`

quicksave.name: quicksave
quicksave.description:
Performs a quick save of the current story state.

Usage: `{quicksave}`

quickload.name: quickload
quickload.description:
Loads the most recent quick save.

Usage: `{quickload}`

dialog.name: dialog
dialog.description:
Opens a dialog with its contents.

Usage:

```
{dialog "title"}
  ...
{/dialog}
```

nobr.name: nobr
nobr.description:
Removes line breaks from its contents.

Usage:

```
{nobr}
  ...
{/nobr}
```

span.name: span
span.description:
Wraps its contents in a `<span>` element.

Usage:

```
{span}
  ...
{/span}
```

settings-controls.name: settings-controls
settings-controls.description:
Renders the settings controls UI.

Usage: `{settings-controls}`

watch.name: watch
watch.description:
Watches a variable for changes and triggers a re-render.

Usage: `{watch $var}`

unless.name: unless
unless.description:
Conditionally displays its contents when the expression is falsy. The inverse of `{if}`.

Usage:

```
{unless condition}
  ...
{/unless}
```
